violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not properly date marked. -Open containers in the refrigerator need date marked.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Top of oven needs cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Vent hood needs cleaned.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Dish washer was at 0 ppm. Facility was able to get it working.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
